name: mission_rewards
description: Mission Pay and Danger Pay (Core Rules pp.83, 120). Base pay is 1D6 credits with situational modifiers. Danger Pay is a separate D10 table for patron jobs.

base_pay.description: Roll 1D6 for base mission pay in credits.

modifiers.description: Roll 1D6 twice, pick the better, and add +1.
Treat any roll of 1 or 2 as a 3. Does NOT apply to Rival missions.
Add Danger Pay bonus on top. Benefits may also apply.

danger_pay.description: Danger Pay for patron jobs. Add +1 if Corporation patron.

battlefield_finds.description: Roll once after Holding the Field. Not after Invasion battles.

entries.description: Randomly select a slain (not Bailed) enemy; keep their weapons.
Roll on Consumables Table, receive 1 dosage.
Gain 1 Quest Rumor. Invasion Threat enemy: Invasion Evidence (+1 credit, +1 Invasion check).
Redeemable as 2 credits only when installing a Starship Component.
On each planet visited, roll 2D6; on 9+ find owner and receive a Loot roll.
Turn in for automatic Corporate Patron on this world. Invasion Threat enemy: Invasion Evidence (+1 credit, +1 Invasion check).

loot_table.description: Main Loot Table (Core Rules pp.131-134). Three-roll process: Category, then Subtable, then Item.

categories.description: Roll twice on Weapons Category, both need Repair.
Roll twice on Gear Subtable, both need Repair.
Roll once on Odds and Ends Subtable.

rewards_subtable.description: Roll 2D6, receive credits equal to highest die.
Discount next ship component by 1D6 credits.
Discount next ship component by 1D6+2 credits.
